basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for RA. Relaxation for SC/ST & women (5 years), OBC (3 years).
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Research Associate (RA) is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and women candidates by 5 years, and for OBC candidates by 3 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or equivalent degree in Life Sciences OR having 3 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after M.Tech (Life Sciences) with at least One research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) Journal.
qualification.details: Research Associate (RA): Ph.D. or equivalent degree in Life Sciences OR M.Tech (Life Sciences) with 3 years of research, teaching and design and development experience and at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) Journal.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR IARI Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 29th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. or equivalent degree in Life Sciences. Alternatively, an M.Tech in Life Sciences with 3 years of relevant experience and at least one SCI journal publication is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 40 years. Age relaxations are provided for SC/ST, women, and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month, plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at the Indian Agricultural Research Institute.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply through email. The application should be sent to the specified email address along with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any specific desirable qualifications for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable qualifications include experience in molecular markers, marker-assisted breeding, field phenotyping, and handling of field rice crops.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indian Agricultural Research Institute located?
faq.answer: The Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q10. What documents need to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach self-attested scanned copies of original documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
